summary: Reviewed OLDA-12 kickoff prerequisites for gcb-src-007-the-renunciaton-of-sumedha. Confirmed the document is registered in data/documents.json, its status file is currently source_ready, the raw markdown source exists, and no source_normalized outputs have been created yet. issues.detail: A01 source normalization has not started yet. normalized markdown, segments JSON, and A01 agent-log are all still missing.

next_recommended_action: Delegate gcb-src-007 source normalization to A01 and block OLDA-12 on that child issue until the required outputs and A01 agent-log exist.
